ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* Unique node ID of the repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the repository including the owner */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository is private */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the repository */,
  "html_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository on GitHub */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "fork" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository is a fork */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was last updated */,
  "pushed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was last pushed to */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* URL of the repository's homepage */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the repository in kilobytes */,
  "stargazers_count" INTEGER /* Number of stargazers the repository has */,
  "watchers_count" INTEGER /* Number of watchers the repository has */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary programming language used in the repository */,
  "has_issues" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository has issues enabled */,
  "has_projects" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository has projects enabled */,
  "has_downloads" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository has downloads enabled */,
  "has_wiki" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository has a wiki enabled */,
  "has_pages" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository has GitHub Pages enabled */,
  "forks_count" INTEGER /* Number of forks the repository has */,
  "archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository is archived */,
  "disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository is disabled */,
  "open_issues_count" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License used by the repository */,
  "topics" TEXT /* List of topics associated with the repository */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the repository has made */,
  "open_issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the repository */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers the repository has */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the repository */,
  "allow_squash_merge" INTEGER /* Indicates if squash merge is allowed */,
  "allow_merge_commit" INTEGER /* Indicates if merge commit is allowed */,
  "allow_rebase_merge" INTEGER /* Indicates if rebase merge is allowed */,
  "network_count" INTEGER /* Number of repositories in the network */,
  "subscribers_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers to the repository */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization that owns the repository */,
  "repo_type" TEXT /* Type of repository (e.g., public, private, fork) */,
  "repo_status" TEXT /* Status of the repository (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the owner */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the owner */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the owner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the owner */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the owner joined GitHub */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the organization */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the contributor contributes to */,
  "contributor_type" TEXT /* Type of contributor (e.g., owner, collaborator, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the issue belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was last updated */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was closed */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the issue (open/closed) */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the issue */,
  "assignee" TEXT /* User assigned to the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the issue */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the pull request belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was last updated */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was closed */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was merged */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the pull request (open/closed/merged) */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the pull request */,
  "assignee" TEXT /* User assigned to the pull request */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the pull request */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone associated with the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "committed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the commit was made */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  "committer" TEXT /* Committer of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the release belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Tag name of the release */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was created */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was published */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the release */,
  "draft" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is a draft */,
  "prelease" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is a pre-release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of permissions */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the permissions are for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permissions are for */,
  "admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin permissions */,
  "push" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can push to the repository */,
  "pull" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can pull from the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the topic is associated with */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the label is associated with */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the milestone is associated with */,
  "milestone_title" TEXT /* Title of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
